headline: First Merchants (FRME) Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates
summary: First Merchants (FRME) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.29% and -12.75%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: JPMorgan Cuts PT on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Amid Fiscal Q1 Preview
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) is one of the best low priced stocks to buy right now. JPMorgan cut the price target on Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) to $19 from $21 on April 7 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm adjusted price targets in the large-cap bank group as part of a […]

headline: HWC Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Higher NII, Expenses Rise Y/Y
summary: Hancock Whitney beats Q1 EPS estimates on higher NII, but restructuring losses, weak revenues and rising expenses weigh on overall performance.
